sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55908" key="kathga/qeos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατηγάθεος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">γᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, strengthd. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἠγ</foreign>-, epith. of Zeus, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antioch.</author> </bibl> Astr.in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.109</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
